title: Orison x86_64 Codegen Report v1
description: Structured envelope returned alongside a hand-encoded x86_64 byte buffer. Bytes are deterministic given the same input instruction sequence; the hash is computed over the emitted bytes using FNV-1a (64-bit, prefix 'fnv1a:').

byte_count.description: Total number of machine-code bytes produced by encode().

instruction_count.description: Number of X64Instr items consumed from the input program.

hash.description: Deterministic FNV-1a 64-bit hash of the emitted bytes, formatted as 'fnv1a:<16 hex chars>'.
